# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: MeshConfig
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
  allowlist: {}
  admin:
    auth:
      tls: {}
    addressBook: {}
    dnsPolicy: USE_SIDECAR
    disable: false
    healthCheck: {}
    httpConfig:
      http1MaxHeaderSize: 64k
      http2MaxFrameSize: 4m
    proxyAdminPort: 15000
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  egressPolicy: ALLOW_ALL
  ingressGateways:
  - name: istio-ingressgateway
    enabled: true
  telemetry:
    action: ENABLE_TELEMETRY
  tracing: {}
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - '*'
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 15000
    route:
    - destination:
        host: istio-telemetry
        port:
          number: 2113
  tls:
    mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  host: istio-telemetry
  trafficPolicy:
    tcp: {}
    tls: {}
    http:
      compress: ENABLE_GZIP
      maxInitialIdleConnections: 100
      maxInitialRequestCapacity: 2000
      connectionPool: {}
